title: Bag of Words & N-Grams
content:
# Bag of Words & N-Grams

## 1. BoW Vector Representation
Given vocabulary $\mathcal{V}$, document vector $\mathbf{d} \in \mathbb{R}^{|\mathcal{V}|}$ is:

$$d_j = \sum_{t \in \text{tokens}} \mathbb{I}(t = w_j)$$

## 2. N-Gram Complexity
*   Theoretical vocabulary size scales as $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{V}|^n)$.
*   Pruned using `min_df`, `max_df`, and `max_features` constraints.
